title: Relief from Lower Back Pain: 11 Herbal Creams for Office Workers
description: Arnica montana creams are a popular natural remedy for lower back pain relief. This is because the plant contains compounds like thymol, tannins, and sesquiterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. When applied topically, these compounds can penetrate deep into the skin and muscles, reducing inflammation and alleviating pain in the lower back area.
